questions.question: Is there a collision or physical contact between the trailer and another vehicle, person, or fixed object?
Does any vehicle approach dangerously close to the trailer without contact (near-miss)?
What type of contact or near-miss occurred?
options: A. Rear-end collision from following vehicle

questions.question: What are the current weather conditions in the scene?
What time of day best describes the lighting conditions?
Does the trailer exhibit visible lateral sway or fishtailing?
Is there a visible issue with the tow hitch or coupler (excessive bounce, abnormal angle, loose chains)?
Does the trailer pass dangerously close to a fixed object (post, curb, parked car) during a turn or maneuver?
What is the towing vehicle currently doing?
options: A. Moving forward on a road

questions.question: Are other vehicles visible behind or beside the trailer?
Is the road surface wet or showing signs of rain?
